title: turnera serrata var. serrata
intro: Turnera serrata var. serrata, also known as the West Indian sarsaparilla or horse-heal, is a plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Turnera serrata var. serrata include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and lower blood sugar levels, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and diabetes. Herbal preparations of Turnera serrata var. serrata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
